nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 查島鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 查島鸚鵡（Chatham Islands parakeet，学名 Cyanoramphus forbesi），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This parakeet is one of New Zealand's rarest birds and is classified as Vulnerable on the IUCN Red List, as a result of a range of threats to the species survival, including habitat loss, predation, and hybridization

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: 3) |year=1985 |location=Cambridge, UK |pages=195–211 |chapter=Status, habits and conservation of Cyanoramphus parakeets in the New Zealand region}} These threats include deforestation and habitat destruction, the introduction of predators, and the fact that the entire population is confined to two small islands in the Chatham Islands group-Mangere and Little Mangere Islands, which are only 112ha and 16ha respectively.{{cite journal |last=Taylor |first=R
